entries.title: Daily drill: vLLM KV-Cache Exhaustion Under Traffic Burst
entries.summary: Added a Hard-difficulty ML Serving hotfix drill covering vLLM KV-cache exhaustion on A100 GPUs triggered by a marketing email blast. Scenario includes exact CUDA OOM error messages, Prometheus metric names, and a 5-step exercise from triage through root-fix with HPA autoscaling.
items_added: vLLM KV-Cache Exhaustion Under Traffic Burst

entries.title: Daily drill: Triton Inference Server Silent Fallback — Model Config/Weight Shape Mismatch
entries.summary: Added a Hard-difficulty ML Serving hotfix drill: Triton silently falls back to stale model weights after a config/weight shape mismatch breaks hot-reload from S3. Scenario includes exact Triton error log lines, SageMaker Feature Store context, GitHub Actions CI bug, and a 6-step exercise from triage to prevention.
items_added: Triton Inference Server Silent Fallback — Model Config/Weight Shape Mismatch

entries.title: Friday update: drill + market signal scan
entries.summary: Added a Hard hotfix drill for Azure Cosmos DB hot-partition RU exhaustion triggered by viral celebrity traffic. Ran market signal scan: added 4 new business problems covering AI data center networking (Nexthop AI $500M Series B), on-device local AI (OpenClaw 210K stars), industrial physical AI (Mind Robotics $500M Series A), and AI-native inference chips (Rebellions $400M pre-IPO, Inferact $150M seed).
items_added: Azure Cosmos DB Hot Partition — RU Exhaustion on Viral Traffic

entries.title: Daily drill: Kafka Consumer Livelock — max.poll.interval.ms Breach During Downstream Throttle
entries.summary: Added a Hard-difficulty distributed-systems hotfix drill: a Java Kafka consumer group on AWS EKS enters an infinite livelock when a SendGrid API slowdown (48ms → 11.2s) causes batch processing to exceed max.poll.interval.ms=300s. All 6 consumers repeatedly get ejected and rejoin without committing offsets, growing lag at 195K messages/minute across 120 partitions. Exercise covers triage via JMX rebalance-rate metrics, immediate mitigation by reducing max.poll.records, circuit-breaker isolation of the downstream, and prevention via dynamic poll sizing and rebalance-rate alerting.
items_added: Kafka Consumer Livelock — max.poll.interval.ms Breach During Downstream Throttle

entries.title: Monday update: drill + knowledge base refresh
entries.summary: Added a Hard distributed-systems drill for Cassandra compaction storm on GCP (all 6 nodes doing concurrent STCS major compaction, saturating disk I/O at 99%, ReadStage pending=2847). KB refresh: 3 new ML systems entries (prefill-decode disaggregation, P-EAGLE parallel speculative decoding, context engineering for agents), 1 new system design entry (AI agent orchestration via MCP), and 3 new org-decision entries (AI agent production readiness, staff engineers in the AI era, AI agent governance framework).
items_added: Cassandra Compaction Storm During Write-Heavy Migration
